p1.title: CP00-052 evidence pack not yet created during Claude review
p1.issue: The contract flips 10 subphases (RP00.P02.M09.S01-S10) to status "production_ready" with closeout_pack_ref CP00-052 and evidence_root docs/closeout-packs/cp00-052, and current_subphase points there, but the evidence pack does not exist yet. The validator script reads docs/closeout-packs/cp00-052/manifest.json plus the per-closeout construction-inspection.json and enforces inspection.control_plane_claude_review_packet_boundary_suite_verified===true with inspection.subphase_id===RP00.P02.M09.S10 (terminal). Until those files exist, npm run rp00:control-plane:validate stays red. This is the known, expected post-review step (this review's output becomes claude-review-result.json), not a code defect, but it must be completed before the pack can close green.
p1.recommendation: Generate docs/closeout-packs/cp00-052/{manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json}. construction-inspection.json must set production_ready=true, control_plane_claude_review_packet_boundary_suite_verified=true, subphase_id=RP00.P02.M09.S10, fixture_ref=control_plane_claude_review_packet_boundary_suite, and a human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_boundary recording handoff to RP00.P02.M09.S11. Then re-run rp00:control-plane:validate to confirm green.
p1.adjudication: Resolved by creating CP00-052 manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection with control_plane_claude_review_packet_boundary_suite_verified=true, followed by final validators.

p3.title: Decision fields should be enum-constrained
p3.adjudication: Fixed by adding enum checks for matter_trace_decision, permission_decision, primary_happy_path_decision, secondary_workflow_path_decision, state_transition_decision, and idempotency_decision.

p3.title: Denied-path test should explicitly assert result validator
p3.adjudication: Fixed by adding assertControlPlaneClaudeReviewPacketBoundarySuiteResult(denied) to the denied-path test.

p3.title: Confirm CP00-052 required_evidence_refs intentionally point to upstream CP00-051 artifacts
p3.adjudication: Confirmed. CP00-052 is the Claude Review Packet that consumes upstream CP00-051 Hermes Evidence Packet artifacts; CP00-052 local evidence artifacts are recorded separately as closeout pack artifacts.

boundary_checks.no_service_logic_execution: PASS - service_logic_execution_permitted:false; assembler returns frozen metadata only
boundary_checks.no_real_data: PASS - synthetic fixture and no credentials/secrets
boundary_checks.fail_closed: PASS - entrypoint/source/model/evidence/gate drift and unsafe claims throw; cross-tenant drift is denied metadata
boundary_checks.plan_binding: PASS - planned/actual pack CP00-052, requested provenance CP00-051, Risk A, 10 units S01-S10
boundary_checks.handoff: PASS - M09 remains open, source_micro_phase_completed=false, next_subphase RP00.P02.M09.S11

parsed_review.recommendation: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No unresolved P0/P1/P2 findings remain after evidence creation and P3 hardening/adjudication.

It rejects any truthy boundaryClaims (forbidden -> specific error, otherwise unknown-claim error), enforces entrypoint=claude_review_packet, source_micro_phase_id=RP00.P02.M09, model_id=claude-opus-4-8 / effort=max, read_only_review_required=true, and exact-match on hermes_evidence_refs and acceptance_gate_ids. Tenant isolation is enforced (all four tenant ids must match or the result fails closed to deny_cross_tenant_boundary with blocked decisions and a blocked_claim_ref). M09 is correctly NOT completed: source_micro_phase_completed=false, completesSourceMicroPhase=false, and the stated rp00 result (failing only on evidence) implies the weighted ledger keeps S10 terminal=false chaining to S11; next_subphase=RP00.P02.M09.S11 is set everywhere (result, policy, module, definition closeout_state_policy, README). Cross-artifact consistency between policy, module, definition, fixture, validators, and the validator script is internally aligned: result field order in the fixture matches the assembler (the script's JSON.stringify(fixture.result)===assemble(fixture.input) live check passes per the stated results), the idempotency_key derivation (command_evidence_ref sanitized via /[^a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]+/g and prefixed with tenant id) reproduces the fixture value, and the result is deeply frozen (top object plus nested arrays). The requested/planned/actual pack provenance (requested CP00-051 -> planned/actual CP00-052, deviation_from_plan=false, correction_reason 'shifted to CP00-052') is consistent and validated; it does not collide with the already-closed CP00-051 Hermes pack because requested_pack_id is provenance metadata only. Security: no injection surface (strings are metadata only, never used in queries or shell), no secrets/real data (fixture_integrity asserts synthetic_only/no_credentials_or_secrets), and model_id/effort are recorded, never used to invoke anything. No P0/P1 logic defects found in the reviewed code. The single gating item is procedural: the CP00-052 evidence pack must be generated and rp00 validate re-run before closure.
